title: Perform extracorporeal blood purification
description: The dialysis machine shall provide continuous extracorporeal blood purification with configurable flow rates.

verification.description: Verification of blood and dialysate flow control accuracy.

title: Blood Flow Rate range
description: The system shall support Blood Flow Rate (BFR) between 50 and 600 mL/min.

title: Transmembrane Pressure Safety
description: The system shall monitor Transmembrane Pressure (TMP) and trigger an alarm if it exceeds safety limits (default 500 mmHg).

verification.description: Simulate high TMP and verify alarm trigger and pump stop.

title: Blood-Dialysate Interface
description: The Blood Circuit shall interface with the Dialysate Circuit through a high-flux dialyzer membrane.

verification.description: Verification of dialyzer membrane specifications and interface connections.
